title: Reliable Bash Automation and Tests · Incident Repair Bay
summary: Turn a fragile command history into a bounded script that validates inputs, preserves data, reports failures, and can be rerun safely. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a tested idempotent Bash operations script and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Define script inputs, outputs, side effects, preconditions, exit codes, and rerun behavior before implementation.
Use set options, traps, explicit conditionals, and status handling while understanding where errexit and pipefail do not behave intuitively.
Handle positional parameters, defaults, validation, arrays, and quoted expansion without word splitting or glob injection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# linux-basics cumulative operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic stateful terminal simulator.
# Record hypothesis, command, expected signal, observation, conclusion, and recovery.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record
steps.instruction:
debug case — A report script receives filenames "north 5.csv" and "--dry-run" plus one missing file. Preserve argument boundaries, validate before mutation, clean temporary state, and prove rerunning is idempotent. Competency probe: Define script inputs, outputs, side effects, preconditions, exit codes, and rerun behavior before implementation.

Inspect the Script Contract trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for define script inputs, outputs, side effects, preconditions, exit codes, and rerun behavior before implementation.

content.text: For Script Contract, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Script Contract, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Script Contract record says a tested idempotent Bash operations script looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve inspect the failure record.

This does not satisfy Script Contract for a tested idempotent Bash operations script.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a safe Linux operations investigation headed "# Evidence: linux-bash-test-evidence-ah4nll" with a concrete hypothesis, one bounded simulator command, and an observation that changes the next decision.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Bash Test Evidence into observable performance evidence.
